description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a two-tone finish, featuring a tan slide and a matte black polymer frame. The slide is engraved with the word 'KAPPUTT' and has serrations at the rear for improved grip during slide manipulation. The frame includes a textured grip with ergonomic finger grooves and a visible magazine release button, as well as a squared-off trigger guard. The handgun is accompanied by a detachable magazine and several loose brass cartridges, suggesting it is chambered for a common pistol caliber. The overall design is compact and tactical, suitable for urban law enforcement or personal defense scenarios.
description: A compact, two-tone semi-automatic handgun with a tan slide, black textured grip, and visible magazine and cartridges. Features include slide serrations, ergonomic grip, and prominent 'KAPPUTT' marking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan slide with 'KAPPUTT' marking, black grip with finger grooves, and magazine partially inserted.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the squared-off trigger guard; magazine and cartridges are visible on the ground.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, slide serrations, and the full length of the magazine and cartridges.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the grip's ergonomic contour; magazine and cartridges are also visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with pronounced finger grooves for ergonomic handling and features a stippled texture for enhanced traction. It is constructed from matte black polymer, providing a modern, tactical appearance. The grip includes a visible magazine release button and is slightly flared at the base for easier magazine insertion. No visible logos or embellishments are present on the grip surface.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a robust, thick profile and a slight undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame and lacks additional texturing or reinforcement, presenting a utilitarian, tactical look.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and does not appear to be threaded or ported. It has a matte finish consistent with the slide and no visible external markings or compensators.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features a prominent 'KAPPUTT' engraving on the left side in bold, white block letters. No other visible markings, serial numbers, or decorative patterns are present on the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat with slightly beveled edges, constructed from black polymer. It lacks finger rests or flaring but appears robust and functional, with no visible logos or texturing.
